fields.title: Resolve spawned-agent execution profiles at spawn time
fields.description: Agent templates already separate identity from execution policy, but mode agents and tool allowlists still resolve through partially separate paths. Unify them by resolving concrete execution profiles only when a child session is created.
fields.design: Introduce unresolved agent execution specs and keep AgentRegistry focused on discovery plus static config. Virtual mode agents should emit selectors/specs rather than pre-resolved models. At spawn time, resolve a concrete execution profile through execution services, apply tool policy through the same execution-policy model, and persist the resolved execution profile into child session state alongside sandbox data. Keep /agents focused on enable/disable; do not add profile-assignment UX there.
